policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-psql-05 - Disabled PostgreSQL single server and CosmosDB PostgreSQL'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+PostgreSQL#IncidentremediationPostgreSQL#drcp-psql-05 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP PostgreSQL Disable PostgreSQL single server and Cosmos DB PostgreSQL
policyDefinition.description: This policy ensures only PostgreSQL flexible server can be used. PostgreSQL single server and CosmosDB PostgreSQL are blocked.

drcp.name: PostgreSQLDisableOtherPSQLSolutions
drcp.controlDesc: Disable PostgreSQL single server and CosmosDB PostgreSQL

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Disabled or Deny.
